# Conf change V2 joint consensus scenario.
# Apply a JointImplicit transition that promotes node 4 as voter and demotes
# node 3 to learner, then verify auto-leave back to a single-config state.

add-nodes id=1,2,3 voters=1,2,3
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0
INFO 2 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 2 became follower at term 0
INFO 3 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 3 became follower at term 0

campaign id=1
----
INFO 1 is starting a new election
INFO 1 became StateCandidate at term 1

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateCandidate term=1 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgRequestVote from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 3 receiving MsgRequestVote from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3

# Apply joint conf change directly (skip propose+commit for brevity).
# v4 = add as voter; l3 = make learner.
apply-conf-change id=1 changes=v4,l3
----
voters=(1 2 4) learners=() auto-leave=true

# Add node 4 itself so we can drive its inbox.
add-nodes id=4 voters=1,2,3,4
----
INFO 4 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3 4)
INFO 4 became follower at term 0

# Verify we're in joint state with auto-leave armed.
status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateLeader term=1 lead=1 commit=1 lastIndex=1

# Empty changes = leave joint.
apply-conf-change id=1 changes=
----
voters=(1 2 4) learners=(3) auto-leave=false

status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateLeader term=1 lead=1 commit=1 lastIndex=1
